description: Generated API client or schema output was edited directly while the source contract stayed stale.
body: Failure mode: tests or examples pass against manually edited generated files, but the next generation step reverts the change or clients regenerate the old contract. Diagnostic trigger: diffs touch generated SDK, OpenAPI output, GraphQL types, or RPC clients without touching the schema source or generator command. Do-not-use signal: do not treat generated artifact edits as authoritative contract changes unless the project documents that artifact as the source. Recovery: find and update the source schema or route annotations, regenerate artifacts, and diff the result. Risk boundary: if source ownership is unclear, stop and report the ambiguity instead of guessing which contract clients consume.
